text.message: Do you have something against me lol
Robbed me three times in. A row for no reason
Yeah black you aren’t close at all
I’m much closer than you, obviously
Whiteflcusing me all game I won’t understand
well you are his army competitor
Says the guy siting on 3 devs
let me use it my turn
I guess you dont realize, white doesnt extend his army
do it.. while we are blocked
White will be dumb enough to hit me next turn
Idk why you wouldn’t trade that brick to extend game
red you want i let you win or what?
He’s just gonna get perma solod
I’m in last place and you’re soloing me
well blue wins this for sure
Blue or black, but dumb white is hitting me lol
He just can’t handle the chat, little ego
red wins next round, and still crying
Talking trash to your little ego kiddo
